title: Virginia Advances in ACC Tourney with Victory Over NC State
summary: No. 10 Virginia defeats NC State 81-74 for the third time this season in the ACC Tournament. Malik Thomas scored 16 points.
charlotte_impact: Virginia's continued success in the ACC Tournament boosts team morale and fan engagement in the region.

title: Virginia Secures ACC Tournament Win Against NC State
summary: Virginia defeats NC State 81- in the ACC Tournament. Malik Thomas led with 16 points, Thijs De Ridder added 15.
charlotte_impact: This win advances Virginia in the tournament, increasing their chances for a championship run.

title: Virginia and NC State Face Off in ACC Tournament Quarterfinals
summary: Virginia plays NC State in the quarterfinal round of the 2026 ACC Tournament in Charlotte.
charlotte_impact: This game is a critical step for both teams in their pursuit of the ACC Tournament title.

title: NC State vs. Virginia: ACC Tournament Predictions
summary: Preview of the NC State Wolfpack vs. Virginia Cavaliers ACC Tournament quarterfinal game in Charlotte, North Carolina.
charlotte_impact: Provides insights and predictions for fans and bettors interested in the ACC Tournament game.

title: Queens Royals Make History with NCAA Tournament Debut
summary: Queens University of Charlotte celebrates its men's basketball team's first-ever NCAA Men's Basketball Tournament appearance.
charlotte_impact: This historic event brings pride and excitement to the university and the Charlotte community.

title: Monroe Native Inspires STEM as NASA's Hidden Figure
summary: Dr. Christine Darden, from Monroe, NC, and NASA's human computers inspire women in STEM during Women's History Month.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the achievements of local individuals and promotes STEM education for future generations.

title: Gaston County Farmers Markets to Accept SNAP Benefits
summary: Farmers markets in Gastonia, Mount Holly, and Belmont will accept SNAP benefits starting in April, increasing access to fresh food.
charlotte_impact: Improves food access for low-income residents and supports local farmers in Gaston County.

title: Spring Weather Arrives with a Warm Surge Expected
summary: Weather forecast predicts a steady increase in temperatures, with Friday feeling like April, Saturday like May, and Sunday like June.
charlotte_impact: Provides residents with information to plan their activities based on the changing weather conditions.

title: I-77 Toll Lanes and Crash Policies Verified
summary: Verification of whether I-77 toll lanes become free during major crashes, clarifying toll policies near crash sites.
charlotte_impact: Addresses public confusion about toll lane policies during traffic incidents on I-77.

title: Charlotte City Council Seeks Federal Funding for Law Enforcement
summary: Charlotte City Council requests $10M+ in federal funding for law enforcement equipment, including cars, cameras, and radios.
charlotte_impact: Aims to enhance law enforcement capabilities and improve public safety in Charlotte.

title: Historic Salisbury Building Transformed into Senior Housing
summary: A historic building in downtown Salisbury is converted into an affordable senior housing community.
charlotte_impact: Provides much-needed affordable housing for seniors and revitalizes a historic building.

title: Authorities Seek Identification of Skeletal Remains in Lancaster
summary: Lancaster authorities release a composite image to identify skeletal remains found in 2024, seeking public assistance.
charlotte_impact: Hopes to bring closure to a cold case and provide answers to the deceased's family.

title: Juvenile Arrested in Monroe Bedroom Break-In
summary: Monroe Police arrest a juvenile suspect in a break-in where a woman awoke to find someone trying to remove her clothing.
charlotte_impact: Raises concerns about safety and security in residential areas of Monroe.

title: I-485 Crash Shuts Down Lanes in Charlotte
summary: A crash on the I-485 outer loop near Park Road causes lane closures in southeast Charlotte.
charlotte_impact: Disrupts traffic flow and causes delays for commuters in the Charlotte area.

title: Shooting Near Walmart in University City, Suspect Arrested
summary: A shooting outside the Walmart on North Tryon Street injures one person; a suspect has been arrested.
charlotte_impact: Increases concerns about crime and safety in the University City area of Charlotte.
